config.syndicate.base_spacing_chunks.too: Distance in chunks between grid cell centres. Higher = rarer bases.
Min. distance from cell edge to base centre. Must be less than spacing / 2.
config.syndicate.guard_arrow_damage.tool: Base damage per arrow. Vanilla skeleton arrow = 2.0.
config.syndicate.guards_per_item.tooltip: targetGuards = clamp(floor(items x guardsPerItem), min, max).
config.syndicate.min_guards.tooltip: Minimum number of guards, even in an empty base.
config.syndicate.max_guards.tooltip: Cap on guard count regardless of loot amount.
config.syndicate.guard_respawn_interval_: Ticks between each respawn attempt. 6000 = 5 minutes.
config.syndicate.guard_respawn_player_bu: Player within base AABB + buffer prevents respawn.
config.syndicate.starter_loot_total.tool: Total items placed in base chests at creation.
Of starterLootTotal: number from the priority list (priority 100-400).
config.syndicate.raid_threshold.tooltip: Fraction of peak loot count that triggers raid detection.
config.syndicate.loot_delivery_radius.to: Max distance from which a thief delivers loot to a base chest.
config.syndicate.map_trader_chance.toolt: Probability that a Wandering Trader carries a Syndicate Map.
When enabled, a waypoint is added to Xaero's Minimap each time a base is located via /locate or the Syndicate Map. Disabled by default — bases are secret.
